form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 7th on April 9 over 600m at this track behind Bad And Bertha beaten 10 lengths (35.41) in a Grade 5. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

form.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion before missing the frame last time out, finishing fourth (36.45) at Q Lakeside. Has a low draw but prefer each-way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been racing in honest fashion before missing the frame last time out, finishing fourth (36.45) at Q Lakeside. Has a low draw but prefer each-way.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (30.74) when second at Q Lakeside in a Grade 5/6. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Angle Park (35.19) in a Grade 5/6, finishing a 10 length fourth. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (25.62) over 457m at Q Lakeside. Wide draw here. Prefer others.

formComments.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (25.62) over 457m at Q Lakeside. Wide draw here. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Q Lakeside over 550m. Last start finished 2nd on April 12 over 600m at this track behind Cheers For Bella beaten 5 lengths (34.97) in a Grade 5. Has an exceptional 34.46 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.
